theme.description: Choose a theme that suits your style and lighting. You can switch modes at any time.
theme.dark_desc: Dark theme comfortable for low light conditions
theme.light_desc: Clean light theme for bright conditions

about.title: About
about.description1: {{name}} is a simple platform that lets you publish and share your thoughts, opinions, or anything on your mind with complete privacy and confidentiality without revealing your real identity.
about.description2: Every post automatically and permanently disappears from the app and our servers exactly 24 hours after being published.

user_info.title: Personal Account Data
user_info.security_note: "Athar" is fully committed to maintaining the complete confidentiality of your identity. Your account information and email are not visible to any other user and are used only for secure two-factor authentication and account recovery.

reports.title: Reports & Complaints
reports.description: Track the status of posts you reported for inappropriateness, and the actions taken by support.
reports.empty_title: Your environment is safe and clean!
reports.empty_desc: You haven't reported any posts, or all public feed posts comply with safety standards.

change_email.title: Change Email
change_email.description: Enter your new email address to save it to your account instead of the current one:
change_email.empty_error: Please enter the new email address.
change_email.same_error: New email matches the current one.
change_email.save_failed: Failed to save new email. Please try again later.
change_email.otp_hint: A verification code will be sent to your current email to confirm your identity

change_email.invalid_code: Please enter a valid 6-digit verification code
change_email.success_hint: Your email has been updated successfully. Use your new email to log in going forward.

support.description: We'd love to hear your feedback and inquiries. Please fill in the details below and our support team will get back to you soon:
support.placeholder: Write the details of your issue or inquiry here...
support.success: Your message has been sent successfully!
support.failed: Failed to send message. Please try again later.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security Policy
privacy.section1_text: At Athar, we prioritize your privacy and confidentiality above all. Your personal data, identity, and geographic location are never shared with any third party.
privacy.section2_text: All posts appear under a persistent pseudonym that cannot be traced back to your real email address.
privacy.section3_text: All posts are permanently and automatically deleted from our servers and the app exactly 24 hours after publication.
privacy.section4_text: We do not retain any records or history of posts after they expire. Expiration means permanent deletion from system servers.
privacy.section5_text: We use the latest encryption technologies and verification codes to secure your browsing session and protect your account.
privacy.read_full_privacy: Read the full privacy policy on our website

notifications.title: Notifications & Alerts
notifications.empty_desc: Your feed is quiet. Share inspiring posts on the main page for everyone to interact with!
notifications.likes_hint: Others have interacted with the impact you left. Keep sharing inspiration and writing great posts.

eula.title: Terms of Service & EULA
eula.intro: Please read the End User License Agreement (EULA) and Content Acceptance Policy carefully. Your use of the app constitutes your explicit and full acceptance of these terms.
eula.section1_intro: Athar enforces a strict Zero-Tolerance Policy against any abusive behavior or harmful content. The following actions are strictly prohibited:
eula.section1_bullet1: Harassment: Defamation, blackmail, threats, or abuse of any user in any form is prohibited.
eula.section1_bullet2: Abusive and Obscene Content: Profanity, pornographic images or text, and content contrary to public decency is strictly forbidden.
eula.section1_bullet3: Hate Speech and Violence: Hate speech, racism, discrimination, or incitement to violence and harm is strictly prohibited.
eula.section2_title: 2. Immediate and Permanent Ban of Abusive Users
eula.section2_intro: In full compliance with Apple App Store Guidelines (Section 1.2) for User Generated Content (UGC):
eula.section2_bullet1: Immediate Penalty: Any user found violating the terms by posting abusive content will have their account and device permanently banned immediately and without prior warning.
eula.section2_bullet2: Removal of Violating Content: The moderation team reviews and removes any reported content confirmed to be in violation within a maximum of 24 hours from the report date.
eula.section3_intro: The app provides active and easy-to-use defense mechanisms to protect users from abusive content:
eula.section3_bullet1: Report Button: Allows you to immediately report any violating post for review and removal by administration.
eula.section3_bullet2: Block Button: Allows you to instantly block any post author. Once blocked, you will no longer see any future posts from that author, nor will they be able to see your posts.

update.title: Update Available
update.message: We've launched a new update for Athar with advanced security features and engineering improvements. To ensure your premium experience continues, please update the app now.
